title: Check Out - Status Transition & Booking Finalization

assertions.expected: Tab shows bookings filtered by status CHECKIN with item.end = today
assertions.actual: Dashboard loaded; Check Out tab active; filtered list shows 2 bookings due for check-out today

assertions.step: Verify tab filters by status CHECKIN + item.end = today
assertions.expected: Only bookings with status CHECKIN and checkout date = today visible
assertions.actual: All visible bookings have status CHECKIN; checkout_date matches today (2026-06-26)

assertions.step: Click Check Out button on a CHECKIN booking
assertions.expected: Button click triggers checkout action; API call succeeds
assertions.actual: POST /api/v1/booking/checkout returned 200; booking status updated to CHECKED_OUT

assertions.step: Verify booking status changes to CHECKED_OUT
assertions.expected: After checkout, booking shows status CHECKED_OUT; no longer in Check Out tab
assertions.actual: Dashboard refreshed; booking BK_SZ67RSQS now shows status CHECKED_OUT; removed from Check Out tab

assertions.step: Verify checkout date timestamp is recorded
assertions.expected: Booking record includes checkout_timestamp with current time
assertions.actual: Booking data shows checkout_timestamp: 2026-06-26T20:16:29Z (accurate to transaction time)
Network HAR confirms POST /api/v1/booking/checkout status 200 OK; response time 189ms

notes: File coverage: src/components/Dashboard.tsx:191-220. Status workflow CHECKIN→CHECKED_OUT verified. Booking finalization completed.
